title: Qualatex 97502 Frozen 2 Single Bubble Balloon
features: Made by Qualatex - The Choice of Professionals
Bubbles are long lasting stretchy plastic balloons featuring colourful see-through designs
description: From the manufacturer Have an Epic Frozen 2 Party with Disney Frozen 2 and Pioneer Party Complete your Frozen Party Range Make your Frozen 2 party unforgettable with our huge range of Frozen Party products. Frozen Party Plates Frozen 2 Party plates. 23 cm in size these plates are a perfect size for a children's birthday celebrations. Frozen Party Cups Ideal for holding your party drinks, these paper cups offer a disposable option for holding your party drinks. Frozen Party Napkins Ready to mop up any spillages these frozen party napkins contain 20 per pack and are a must have for any Frozen 2 party. Frozen Party Table cover Our plastic table covers are 120 x 180 cm and are perfect for long rectangular tables.
